title: Idhayam Lyrics Kochadaiiyaan Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Movie: Kochadaiyaan
Lyrics: Vairamuthu
Music: A R Rahman
Singer: Chinmayee, Srinivas		.
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Senthee vizhundha sempor paaraiyil
mandhi uruttum mayilin muttaiyaai.
nalla marathin narunkilai ilindhu
vella suliyil vizhundha malaraai.

idhayam, naluvi nagarndhu nagarndhu
nagarndhu pogudhey ...Yeno
sol yeno,yeno sol sol yeno solvaayo.
Yeno sol sol yeno solvaayo.

idhayam, karaigal marandhu
dhisaigal tholaindhu pogudhey...Yeno
sol yeno,yeno sol sol yeno solvaayo.
Yeno sol sol yeno solvaayo.

poopadhu marandhana kodigal
punnagai marandhadhu minnal
kaaipadhu marandhadhu kaadu
kaaviyam marandhadhu aedu (2)

idhayam, naluvi nagarndhu nagarndhu
nagarndhu pogudhey ...
Yeno sol yeno,
yeno sol sol yeno solvaayo.
Yeno sol sol yeno solvaayo.

sennthamzh piriyum sangam
sengkadal piriyum azhaigal
oliyai piriyum kaattru
uliyai piriyum sirppam (2)

yaano ninnai pirikilen
pirikilen, pirikilen pirikilen
yaano ninnai pirikilen
pirikilen, pirikilen pirikilen

sirukottu perumpazham thoongi yaangu
un uyiro siridhey
kaadhalo peridhey

English Translation
I tried my best :)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Idhayam'?

The song 'Idhayam' conveys deep emotions of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics by Vairamuthu.

What is the plot context of 'Idhayam' in the movie?

'Idhayam' plays a significant role in Kochadaiiyaan, highlighting the romantic moments between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of 'Idhayam'?

The song is sung by Chinmayi and Srinivas, whose voices blend beautifully in this duet.

Who composed the music for 'Idhayam'?

The music for 'Idhayam' was composed by the renowned AR Rahman, known for his unique musical style.

When was 'Idhayam' released?

'Idhayam' was released on March 9, 2014, as part of the Kochadaiiyaan soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Kochadaiiyaan, the song Idhayam serves as a poignant expression of love between the protagonists. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of romance and longing, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments. The collaboration of Chinmayi and Srinivas adds depth to the emotional landscape of the song. Overall, Idhayam beautifully encapsulates the essence of love, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhayam from Kochadaiiyaan is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Chinmayi and Srinivas, combined with AR Rahman's magical composition, this song creates an unforgettable romantic atmosphere. Experience the soothing melodies and poetic lyrics that make this track a must-listen for every romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: The heart keeps moving and moving... Why, tell me why, why won't you say? Why won't you say?
The heart forgets the shores and loses direction... Why, tell me why, why won't you say? Why won't you say?
The flowers forgot to bloom, the vines forgot to smile, the lightning forgot to strike, the forest forgot its poetry.
I won't forget you, I won't forget you, I won't forget you.
The heart keeps moving and moving... Why, tell me why, why won't you say? Why won't you say?
The red Tamil parts, the red sea parts, the echoes part, the wind parts the sculpture.
I won't separate from you, I won't separate, I won't separate, I won't separate.
The small fruit hangs high, your life is small, but love is big.
